description: Logical reasoning and problem-solving proficiency benchmark

tasks.input_data: All deployment approvals are reviewed. Some reviewed changes are urgent. Can it be concluded that some deployment approvals are urgent? Explain briefly.
tasks.expected_output: No. The statements do not establish that the reviewed urgent changes overlap with deployment approvals.

tasks.input_data: Three jobs A, B, and C must run once. A must precede B, C cannot run first, and B must be last. List every valid execution order.
tasks.expected_output: The only valid order is A, C, B.

tasks.input_data: A service error rate rises immediately after a deploy. Rolling back removes the errors, while database latency and traffic remain unchanged. State the most supported cause and the next confirming action.
tasks.expected_output: The deploy is the most supported cause; compare the deployed change or reproduce the failing request against the reverted and deployed versions.
